info.title: Ally Vision Assistant API
info.description: REST endpoints for QR/AR scanning, VQA, face, audio, action, and debug tooling.

post.description: Scan an image for QR codes and AR markers, return contextual info.
Manually add or update a cache entry.

schema.title: Response Add To Cache Qr Cache Post

get.description: Return recent scan history from cache.

schema.title: Response Get History Qr History Get

post.description: Developer endpoint: return raw detections, decoded payload, cache status.

Process a single frame through the full perception pipeline.

Returns detections, segmentation masks, depth estimation,
and fused obstacle records.

Answer a visual question using the VQA reasoner.

Combines perception results with LLM reasoning for
accurate, navigation-focused answers.

get.description: Get session replay data for debugging or review.

delete.description: Delete a session and its data.

get.description: Check system health.
Get performance metrics.

post.description:
Process voice query end-to-end: STT → VQA → TTS.

Target latencies:
- STT: ≤100ms
- VQA: ≤300ms
- TTS: ≤100ms
- Total: ≤500ms

Returns spoken response audio and detailed telemetry.

Analyze scene for top-N highest-risk hazards.

Priority ranking based on:
- Distance (closer = higher priority)
- Direction (center/path = higher priority)
- Confidence (detection quality)
- Collision risk (estimated time to contact)

Returns hazards in short_cue format for TTS output.

parameters.name: top_n

schema.description: Number of top hazards to return
schema.title: Top N

parameters.description: Number of top hazards to return

post.description:
Generate annotated debug image with perception outputs.

Overlays include:
- Bounding boxes with class labels and confidence
- Depth values in meters
- Segmentation masks (optional)
- Hazard priority indicators

Returns base64-encoded annotated image.

Store a multimodal memory.

Accepts image, audio, transcript, and/or scene graph.
Generates embeddings and stores in FAISS index.

Search memories by text query.

Returns top-K similar memories with scores.

Answer a natural language query using retrieved memories.

Uses RAG pipeline with optional LLM reasoning.

get.description: Get a specific memory by ID.
Get all memories for a session.

delete.description: Delete all memories for a session.

get.description: Get recent memories from the last N hours.

post.description:
Set memory consent preferences.

Controls whether memories are stored and if raw media is saved.

get.description: Get current consent settings for a device.

post.description:
Delete all memories.

Requires confirm=true for safety.

delete.description: Delete all stored memories and raw media.

post.description: Run maintenance tasks (retention enforcement, compaction, backup).

get.description: Get memory system health status.
Get memory system statistics.
Get debug information for a session.

post.description:
Record face consent for a given identity (or globally).

When ``identity_id`` is ``__global__`` the consent applies system-wide.

get.description: View face consent log.

post.description:
Face detection — gated by consent.

Returns 403 if consent has not been granted.

delete.description: Delete all stored face embeddings and revoke consent.

get.description: Debug: SSL configuration and status.

Prometheus metrics endpoint for scraping.

Returns metrics in Prometheus text format.

Return aggregate perception and TTS metrics.

Returns avg_latency_ms, tts_failures, misclassification_rate,
total_frames_processed, and degraded_latency_frames.

post.description:
Submit a raw frame for debug perception overlay.

In production the frame bytes would come in the request body.
For now this returns the orchestrator stats and a placeholder overlay.

get.description: List all known debug sessions.
Retrieve structured JSON events for a session.

post.description: Create a new debug session and return its ID.

get.description: Camera feed health: last frame timestamp and age.
Orchestrator health: last processed frame and pipeline status.
Worker pool health: per-pool queue sizes and stats.

Service health summary: circuit breaker states for all external services.

Returns per-service health status, overall system score, and degradation info.

Get health status for a specific service.

Args:
    service_name: Name of the service (deepgram, elevenlabs, ollama, etc.)

post.description:
Scan codebase for potential stale-frame usage points.

Returns known locations where frames/results could be served
without proper timestamp validation — useful for developer audit.
Return current LiveFrameManager state: buffer contents, subscriber info, capture stats.

get.description: Return current frame processing rate and latency stats.

post.description: Read braille from a submitted frame (placeholder — expects frame via LiveKit).

get.description: Debug endpoint for braille segmentation pipeline status.
Check OCR backend installation status with install instructions.
Return watchdog status: stall detections, restarts, alert history.
Check availability of optional heavy dependencies.

post.description:
Export all stored user data in a portable JSON format (GDPR Art. 20).

Returns a JSON object containing:
- ``memory``: all stored memory records + metadata
- ``face``: face identities (names, metadata, consent log — no raw embeddings)
- ``consent``: full consent audit trail
- ``sessions``: debug session logs
- ``export_meta``: timestamp & schema version

delete.description:
Erase all user data (GDPR Art. 17 — Right to Erasure).

Deletes:
- Memory index + metadata
- Face identities + embeddings + consent
- Session logs (audit trail retained in export only)
